entity.summary: Terra Classic automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with permissionless pools, token swaps, on-chain limit-order functionality, liquidity provision, and related DeFi services.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes Market, Swap, DEX Shares, farms, staking, token-factory, P2P, and related protocol surfaces. First-party documentation identifies Garuda DeFi as a Terra Classic AMM with permissionless pools and an on-chain order book. DefiLlama reports current TVL and non-zero recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: Garuda DeFi official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes Market, Swap, DEX Shares, farms, staking, token-factory, P2P, and other live protocol navigation.

evidence.title: Garuda DeFi documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Garuda DeFi as an AMM on Terra Classic and documents permissionless pools, swaps, on-chain order-book limit orders, liquidity provision, token creation, staking, and P2P trading.

evidence.title: GarudaDefi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies GarudaDefi as a Terra Classic DEX and reports current TVL and non-zero recent DEX volume, supporting active classification.
